heading: Separation of ensigns found not fully qualified
label: 3023 Separation of ensigns found not fully qualified
text: If an officer in the grade of ensign is at any time found not fully qualified, the officer shall be separated from the commissioned service.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 853e of this titlePub. L. 107–372

Amendments2025— struck out “permanent” before “grade of ensign” and “the officer’s commission shall be revoked and” before “the officer shall be separated”.Pub. L. 119–602022— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section consisted of subsecs. (a) and (b) relating, respectively, to promotion of ensigns to grade of lieutenant (junior grade) and separation of ensigns found not fully qualified.Pub. L. 117–263

Delegation of FunctionsAs amended by , text of section is identical to that of former subsec. (b) of this section. For delegation of functions of President under former subsec. (b) of this section to Secretary of Commerce, see section 1(a) of Ex. Ord. No. 11023, , 27 F.R. 5131, as amended, set out as a note under , The President.Pub. L. 117–263section 301 of Title 3May 28, 1962
